name: random_password
description: Generate cryptographically secure random passwords or tokens
command: python3 -c "import secrets,string; chars=string.ascii_letters+string.digits+'!@#$%^&*'; pw=''.join(secrets.choice(chars) for _ in range({{length}})); token=secrets.token_hex({{length}}//2); urlsafe=secrets.token_urlsafe({{length}}); print(f'Password: {pw}'); print(f'Hex token: {token}'); print(f'URL-safe: {urlsafe}'); print(f'Length: {{length}} chars')"
